settings.title: Real Patients. Real Smiles. Real Results.

settings.editor: Patients who transformed their smile with All-on-4 dental implants.

settings.title: Dentistry For The Hometown People We Love​

settings.editor: Pleasant Smiles Dental is your local dental practice in Mt. Pleasant that cares deeply for its community. We provide professional, compassionate dental care, especially through our cleanings, which are more than just polishing; they are a preventative measure to help protect your teeth and overall oral health. Our qualified dental hygienists utilize advanced tools to ensure your cleaning reaches spots that regular brushing and flossing miss. We also take the time to examine your oral health, answer your questions, and recommend home dental care tailored to your needs.

Full Arch implants have transformed countless patients' lives by providing a permanent, stable alternative to removable dentures. The implants are anchored directly into the jawbone, preventing bone loss and maintaining facial structure while delivering a natural-looking smile and restored chewing function. Many patients can receive their new teeth in just one day, dramatically reducing treatment time compared to conventional implant approaches.

  • Supports an entire arch of teeth with just four implants, reducing surgical complexity and recovery time
  • Prevents jawbone deterioration that typically occurs with tooth loss or traditional dentures
  • Restores nearly 100% of natural chewing ability, allowing patients to enjoy all their favorite foods
  • Provides a permanent, non-removable solution that looks, feels, and functions like natural teeth
  • Can often be completed in a single day, with immediate loading of a provisional prosthesis

settings.title: What Our Patients Say About Us​

slides.content: The staff here is so lovely! Very nice ladies! And the doctors perform wonderful work. I have severe anxiety at the dentist, but they always make me feel comfortable.
slides.name: Angelica Hernandez

slides.content: I hate going to the dentist but going here makes it so much better. Everyone is so kind and friendly. And I don't think I've ever waited more than 5 minutes to be seen. I've been to several different Dental Offices here in the area and this is hands down the very best one! I highly recommend going here for your dental needs. 10/10!
slides.name: Kimberly Soaper

settings.title: Why Patients are Choosing Pleasant Smiles

settings.editor: Your hometown doctors who are here to serve you. Our mission is to help you have the best oral health possible. We understand your oral health is the gateway to your overall health so we focus on the total person.

settings.address: Pleasant Smiles Dental 204 W 19th St, Mt Pleasant, TX 75455
